narrative:
Williams County has 24,122 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.9 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.6% of registrants.
